prompt: A cohesive multi-image sequence featuring the same consistent subject, former US President Barack Obama, depicted across 10 distinct scenarios, outfits, and artistic styles while maintaining identical facial features, body proportions, and recognizable likeness throughout all frames. This is a sequence of 10 ordered panels: Panel 1: Barack Obama wearing stylish pink glasses, modern portrait lighting. Panel 2: Barack Obama sitting and coding in front of a computer screen, focused expression, casual office setting. Panel 3: Barack Obama wearing a protective helmet and safety vest riding a motorcycle, dynamic outdoor lighting. Panel 4: Barack Obama walking a friendly dog on a park pathway, relaxed posture, natural daylight. Panel 5: A detailed pointillism painting of Barack Obama, visible colored dots forming his portrait, gallery style. Panel 6: Barack Obama standing casually on a historic cobblestone street, European architecture background, soft ambient lighting. Panel 7: Barack Obama dressed formally in a black top hat and wearing a classic silver monocle, elegant studio portrait. Panel 8: A vibrant oil painting of Barack Obama executed in the signature impasto and swirling brushstroke style of Vincent Van Gogh. Panel 9: Barack Obama elegantly holding a stemmed glass of red wine at a dimly lit lounge table, sophisticated atmosphere. Panel 10: Barack Obama walking barefoot on a white sandy beach with gentle ocean waves, sunny tropical daylight. Ensure all images strictly maintain Barack Obama's exact facial features and likeness as a single consistent person.
prompt_cn: 一组包含10张图片的连贯组图，主角始终是前美国总统巴拉克·奥巴马，他在不同的场景、服装和艺术风格中出现，但所有画面中他的面部特征、体型和可识别的外貌保持一致。这是一组按顺序排列的10幅画面：第1幅：巴拉克·奥巴马戴着时尚的粉色眼镜，现代肖像光效。第2幅：巴拉克·奥巴马坐在电脑屏幕前敲代码，神情专注，休闲办公环境。第3幅：巴拉克·奥巴马戴着头盔和防护背心骑着摩托车，动态户外光线。第4幅：巴拉克·奥巴马在公园小径上牵着一只友好的狗散步，姿态放松，自然日光。第5幅：一幅巴拉克·奥巴马的点彩派油画，由可见的彩色小圆点构成他的肖像，画廊风格。第6幅：巴拉克·奥巴马随意地站在一条古老的鹅卵石街道上，背景是欧洲建筑，柔和的环境光。第7幅：巴拉克·奥巴马身穿正式礼服，戴着黑色高顶礼帽和经典的单片眼镜，优雅的影棚肖像。第8幅：一幅以文森特·梵高标志性的厚涂和漩涡笔触风格绘制的巴拉克·奥巴马油画。第9幅：巴拉克·奥巴马在光线昏暗的休息室桌旁优雅地端着一杯红酒，氛围精致。第10幅：巴拉克·奥巴马赤脚走在白沙海滩上，伴随着轻柔的海浪，阳光明媚的热带日光。确保所有图片严格保持巴拉克·奥巴马完全一致的面部特征和外貌。
global_prompt: A cohesive multi-image sequence featuring the same consistent subject, former US President Barack Obama, depicted across various scenarios and artistic styles while strictly maintaining his identical facial features, body proportions, and recognizable likeness in every frame.
global_prompt_cn: 一组包含多张图片的连贯组图，主角始终是前美国总统巴拉克·奥巴马，他在不同的场景和艺术风格中出现，但所有画面中他的面部特征、体型和可识别的外貌严格保持一致。

prompt: Generate a multi-image sequence of exactly 3 frames featuring the exact same person, Joe Biden, maintaining strict facial and physical consistency throughout the set. global_prompt: A strictly consistent multi-image series depicting the exact same individual, Joe Biden, across all frames with identical facial structure, white hair, and aging features. The global theme adapts his likeness to different scenarios and artistic styles while preserving his recognizable identity.

prompt_cn: 一组连贯的多图序列，展示的是完全相同的同一个人，国际著名创作歌手泰勒·斯威夫特，在所有画面中保持完全一致的面部特征和身份标识。图1：泰勒·斯威夫特戴着时尚的粉色太阳镜。图2：描绘泰勒·斯威夫特的古希腊大理石雕塑。图3：泰勒·斯威夫特戴着一顶别致的红色帽子摆姿势。图4：泰勒·斯威夫特穿着时尚的复古警察制服。图5：泰勒·斯威夫特站在一座明亮的蓝色小屋前。图6：一幅色彩斑斓的街头涂鸦壁画，画中是泰勒·斯威夫特。图7：泰勒·斯威夫特微笑着拿着一块生日蛋糕。图8：泰勒·斯威夫特的电影感黑白肖像摄影。图9：泰勒·斯威夫特随意地穿着一件明黄色棉质衬衫。图10：泰勒·斯威夫特在现代健身房的跑步机上锻炼。所有图片都必须明确展现相同的泰勒·斯威夫特，保持面部结构和容貌高度一致。
